subcodes.first_line: O Mirror of Bounty! Bear thou witness unto that which God hath testified in the Pivot of Eternity: verily, I am alive in the Most Glorious Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا مرآت الجود ان اشهد بما شهد الله فی قطب البقاء باننی انا حی فی الافق الابهی
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
